subcodes.first_line: O Ibrahim! Bear thou witness within thyself that verily He is God; there is none other God but Him. He hath sent forth the Messengers with truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ابرهیم ان اشهد فی نفسک بانه هو الله لا اله الا هو قد ارسل الرسل بالحق
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
